name: MSI + Gigabyte consumer motherboards (AMI Aptio variant)
description: MSI + Gigabyte desktop motherboards ship AMI Aptio UEFI firmware. Common in enthusiast + consumer DIY builds. Both vendors customise AMI with a vendor-specific UI (Click BIOS for MSI, DualBIOS / AORUS for Gigabyte).

entries.notes: MSI 'Click BIOS' firmware. TPM enabled by default on AM5 / LGA1700 boards released post-Windows 11 launch.
Gigabyte 'DualBIOS' maintains two firmware copies on-board for recovery. Both are measured on boot.

source: MSI + Gigabyte BIOS download portals; AMI Aptio documentation.
